markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To align on the Alteryx displacement strategy and define clear performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Performance Gap:** Prophecy fails to appear in AI search results for its core strategy ("Alteryx alternatives"), while an unknown competitor (KNIME) consistently ranks \#1. This is a critical issue impacting board confidence and marketing hiring.
  - [**New Strategy:** The plan shifts from general content to a targeted approach: reverse-engineer successful competitor content (e.g., KNIME's detailed listicle) and publish structured articles (with comparison tables) to displace them.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [**March 15 Deadline:** A firm deadline was set to prove the strategy's effectiveness. The goal is to rank for at least one of 15 high-priority queries selected by Raj.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
  - [**Direct Collaboration:** Raj will now work directly with Carrie to select the 15 queries and review the Airtable content plan, ensuring the strategy is fully aligned with Prophecy's business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

## Topics

### Performance Gap & Business Impact

  - **Problem:** Prophecy is invisible in AI search for its core strategy ("Alteryx alternatives"), while an unknown competitor (KNIME) consistently ranks \#1.
  - [**Business Impact:** This visibility gap creates significant challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [**Board Confidence:** Inability to show progress on a key strategic initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [**Hiring:** A VP of Marketing candidate cited the search failure as a reason to decline the role.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Investment:** Raj questioned the value of the \~$180K investment in GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### Strategic Pivot: Reverse-Engineering Success

  - [**New Approach:** Shift from a general content cadence to a targeted strategy that reverse-engineers what is already working.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
  - **Model for Success:** The KNIME listicle, which consistently ranks \#1, was identified as the model to emulate.
      - [**Key Elements:** A single, long-form page with a detailed comparison table and a comprehensive FAQ section.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [**Rationale:** AI models favor structured data (tables, FAQs) for generating direct answers. Emulating this structure is the fastest path to displacing competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)

### New Content Plan & Metrics

  - [**Content Structure:** New articles will adopt the successful KNIME format, including:](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
      - [**Comparison Tables:** To directly contrast Prophecy features with Alteryx and other alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)
      - [**FAQs:** To provide clear, structured answers for AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)
  - [**Performance Goal:** Achieve AI search visibility for at least one of 15 high-priority queries by March 15.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This deadline provides a clear, measurable test of the strategy's effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
      - [**Success →** Continue the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
      - [**Failure →** Raj will create the content internally.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=3183.0)
      - [Share the 53-prompt list with Raj for selection.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Share the Airtable content plan with Raj for review.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=3183.0)
      - [Instruct the production team to add comparison tables to all new and relevant existing Alteryx-related articles.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)
  - [**Raj:**](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Select 15 high-priority queries from the shared list.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
      - [Review the Airtable content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=3183.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=3082.0)
      - [Crawl Prophecy's technical docs to surface existing content that can be repurposed for the Alteryx displacement strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/FJ1QsY7sDRhz-saxPXNgChapFnEMwYcB?tab=summary&timestamp=3082.0)
